news.summary: Tap into the potential of reaching millions of viewers every day by reserving your spot directly on Eightpoint's Wave homepage. The company, based in George Town, Cayman Islands, has introduced Native Direct Deals to facilitate direct advertising placements. This initiative aims to connect advertisers with the extensive audience base of the platform. Don't miss out on this opportunity to secure your direct placement and capitalize on the massive daily views.
news.headline: Eightpoint announces Native Direct Deals for ad placement on Wave homepage, connecting advertisers with millions of daily views.

news.summary: Ally has been announced as the Presenting Partner for the WNBA's inaugural "Rivals Week," featuring exciting games from August 9 to 17. Furthermore, Ally has launched a new sweepstakes giving fans an opportunity to win a trip to the AT&T WNBA All-Star 2025 event in Indianapolis along with $5,000 in cash. This partnership strengthens Ally's commitment to supporting women's sports and enhancing the fan experience.
news.headline: WNBA partners with Ally Financial; Ally to present "Rivals Week". Sweepstakes offer fans a trip to WNBA All-Star 2025 and $5,000.

news.summary: Acquisition positions International Food Solutions, Inc. (IFS) to cater to the increasing demand for culturally relevant meals delivered to homes in diverse communities. The company, based in Orlando, Florida, announced on April 11, 2025, that it has made a strategic move to meet this growing need. IFS is known for offering ready-to-serve meals that are tailored to various cultural preferences and dietary requirements. The acquisition is expected to enhance IFS's ability to serve aged and diverse populations seeking these specialized meal options.
news.headline: International Food Solutions acquires Food With Care to address rising demand for home-delivered, culturally relevant meals for seniors.

news.summary: Shinsegae Department Store has introduced a new distinctive area by renovating a historic structure in Myeong-dong. Named 'The Heritage,' this space showcases Korean craftsmanship and modern artifacts, providing a one-of-a-kind experience for international visitors. The first floor houses the luxury boutique, adding to the allure of the place.
news.headline: Shinsegae unveils 'The Heritage' in Seoul, showcasing Korean culture and luxury in historical building in Myeong-dong.

news.summary: In Maumee, Ohio, on April 11, 2025, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) announced its plans to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. The official press release is scheduled for 7 a.m. EDT, with a subsequent conference call and webcast set for 9 a.m. EDT. This will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's performance and trajectory.
news.headline: Dana Inc. in Ohio (NYSE: DAN) to announce Q1 2025 results on April 30 with press release at 7am EDT, followed by call at 9am EDT.

news.summary: Over 15,000 nominations have been received to endorse pet rescues across the country. The nationwide pet rescue organizations are encountering heightened difficulties such as overcrowding, surge in surrenders, escalating expenses, and insufficient funding. The news was disclosed on April 11, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: "15,000+ nominations for heroic pet rescues honored on National Pet Day by PetPlace® and Pets Best Insurance. Challenges faced highlighted."

news.summary: A premier aesthetics destination, SkinSpirit, has expanded its award-winning services to Sarasota, Florida, marking its 52nd location. This unveiling follows the successful launch in Miami earlier in April 2025. SkinSpirit has established itself as a leader in the industry and continues to grow its presence in key locations.
news.headline: SkinSpirit opens its 52nd location in Sarasota, FL, expanding its services to the area after Miami.

news.summary: Introducing the latest addition to the Goodnites® lineup, the XXL size is now on the market to provide better nights for more children. Recently unveiled in Chicago on April 11, 2025, the #1 nighttime underwear brand has expanded its range to accommodate kids weighing up to 165 lbs. With a strong commitment to ensuring that bedwetting does not limit a child's potential, Goodnites® aims to support families with this inclusive new sizing option.
news.headline: Goodnites® introduces XXL size nighttime underwear for kids up to 165 lbs, aiming to provide better nights for more children.

news.summary: China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) was recognized as "Hospital of the Year" and its CEO was awarded "CEO of the Year" at the 2025 Healthcare Asia Awards in Kuala Lumpur. This prestigious accolade demonstrates the hospital's commitment to smart healthcare and sustainable leadership. The event highlighted CMUH's excellence in the healthcare industry and its significant contributions to the field. This achievement underscores the hospital's dedication to providing quality care and innovative solutions. The awards ceremony celebrated CMUH's outstanding performance and its positive impact on the community.
news.headline: China Medical University Hospital wins "Hospital of the Year" and "CEO of the Year" at 2025 Healthcare Asia Awards, showcasing smart healthcare and sustainable leadership.

news.summary: In preparation for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, graduate students from 20 different business schools participated in a complex supply chain and marketing simulation for Frito-Lay. The event took place in Newark, N.J. on April 11, 2025. Among the competitors, four students from Rutgers Business School emerged as champions, beating out peers from Texas Christian University in the Supply Chain competition.
news.headline: Rutgers Business School students won TCU graduate supply chain case competition, beating out 20 schools.

news.summary: In April, customers making a $75+ purchase at Honey Play Box will receive a complimentary gift, while those spending $125+ can unlock a mystery bundle. Additionally, subscribers to the email list can expect an exclusive offer on April 14th. The company is based in Chino, California, and this promotion is set for Spring 2025.
news.headline: Limited-time deals at Honey Play Box: free gift with $75+ purchase, mystery bundle with $125+. Exclusive offer on April 14th.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India on April 11, 2025, it was reported that the Fire Resistant Cable Market is categorized by Type (XPLE, LSZH, PVC, EPR) and Application (Building & Construction, Automotive & Transportation, Manufacturing, Energy). The worldwide market for Fire Resistant Cable had a value of USD 11,900...
news.headline: Fire Resistant Cable Market expected to hit $15.2 billion by 2031, with current value at $11.9 billion. driven by safety regulations and smart infrastructure growth.

news.summary: HairUWear, a leading alternative hair company, is unveiling a groundbreaking innovation in the wig industry. Introducing the Raquel collection featuring FeatherLite™ fiber and the newly designed LuxLite Cap® II. This new line is set to redefine the world of wigs with its cutting-edge technology. HairUWear, recognized as the top alternative hair company globally, is proud to introduce this revolutionary product to the market. Experience the future of wigs with the Raquel collection, which combines FeatherLite™ fiber with the upgraded LuxLite Cap® II for the ultimate comfort and style.
news.headline: Raquel Welch® introduces revolutionary FeatherLite™ technology for wigs, improving with LuxLite Cap® II. Leading alternative hair company.

news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on April 11, 2025, Norne Thorning Storage ApS, a subsidiary of Fidelis New Energy, LLC, has secured the Exploration License for the Thorning structure from the Danish Minister of Climate, Energy, and Utilities. This license grants Norne the authority to begin operations on the site.
news.headline: Danish government awards Norne Thorning Storage license to explore CO2 storage in Jutland.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Stock Symbol: LUCD) shared the completion of its underwritten transaction. As a cancer prevention medical diagnostics firm, Lucid operates under PAVmed Inc. (Stock Symbol: PAVM). This development signifies a significant step for the company as it operates in the commercial stage.
news.headline: Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD) closes public offering of common stock. Subsidiary of PAVmed Inc. (Nasdaq: PAVM).

news.summary: St. Paul, Minnesota - On April 11, 2025, Panacea Healthcare Solutions revealed the nationwide rollout of its Medicaid Eligibility Program. This expansion stems from the effective program originally formulated by KA Consulting, a reputable player in healthcare financial services. The program's extension across the country signifies a significant stride in increasing access to Medicaid services for a greater number of individuals.
news.headline: Panacea Healthcare Solutions expands nationwide Medicaid Eligibility Program, building on KA Consulting's success in healthcare finance.

news.summary: BXT-25 has demonstrated its ability to deliver oxygen universally, expanding its potential to treat hypoxic diseases. This advancement could significantly impact patients worldwide who suffer from conditions that result in low oxygen levels. The versatile nature of BXT-25 makes it a promising candidate for various medical uses.
news.headline: Bioxytran celebrates 50 years of mitochondrial research with advancements of BXT-25, a universal oxygen carrier for treating hypoxic diseases.

news.summary: Indian-based company Sify Technologies Limited, listed on NASDAQ as SIFY, is set to disclose its unaudited IFRS financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, on April 18, 2025. Sify Technologies is renowned as a top Digital ICT solutions provider in India, offering a wide range of services including Data Center, Cloud, Networks, Security, and Digital services, both locally and internationally. The eagerly awaited announcement will provide stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into the company's performance for the year, shaping expectations and influencing market trends.
news.headline: Sify Technologies to release FY 2024-25 financial results on April 18, 2025. India’s leading digital ICT provider.

news.summary: A financial services company, Dynex Capital, Inc., based in Glen Allen, Virginia, revealed that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.17 per share for its Common Stock (NYSE: DX) for April 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 23, 2025, will receive the dividend on May 1, 2025. Dynex Capital focuses on ethical capital stewardship, utilizing risk management strategies and disciplined capital allocation.
news.headline: Dynex Capital, Inc. declares $0.17 monthly common stock dividend for April 2025, payable on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: Shares of Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE: BK) are down in premarket trading following the release of their first-quarter 2025 results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.58, a 26% increase from the previous year, surpassing the estimated $1.51. Quarterly revenue totaled $4.972 billion, up 6% from the previous year, exceeding the expected $4.771 billion. Fee revenue for the quarter grew by 3% to $3.403 billion. Net interest income saw an 11% increase year-over-year, attributed to higher yields on reinvested securities, partially offset by changes in the deposit mix. Noninterest expenses rose by 2%, driven by increased investments and employee raises, offset by efficiency-related savings.
news.headline: BNY reports Q1 2025 earnings: $1.58 EPS (+26% YoY), $4.972B revenue (+6%), $3.403B fee revenue (+3%), $4.771B consensus.

news.summary: President Donald Trump's official memecoin is set to unlock $321 million in vested tokens on April 18. The 40 million Trump tokens will be available all at once, each trading at about $8. The token has dropped 89% since its peak, with the creators profiting over $350 million while retail investors suffered $2 billion in losses. The token peaked at $73.43 on Jan. 19, a day before Trump's inauguration, but has since declined. Token vests are intended to incentivize long-term holding. Trump's unlock may cause further price drops. Arbirtum previously unlocked $2.32 billion causing an 84% drop in its token value. There will be a total of $519 million in locked crypto tokens released next week. Trump's memecoin unlock is the largest, accounting for 61% of the total. Other projects like Arbitrum, Fasttoken, and Starknet will also release tokens next week. Fasttoken is set to release 20 million tokens, worth $80 million, while Arbitrum and Starknet will release $27 million and $16 million worth of tokens, respectively.
news.headline: $321M Trump memecoin unlock next week; 40M tokens at $8, down 89% from $73 ATH. $2B losses for 813,000 wallets. $519M tokens unlock in April.

news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on April 11, 2025, Emera Inc. (TSX: EMA) announced that the Board of Directors approved quarterly dividends for its common shares and First Preferred Shares. The dividends are set to be paid on or after May 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2025. The dividends per share are as follows: $0.7250 for common shares, $0.1364 for Series A First Preferred Shares, $0.3032 for Series B First Preferred Shares, $0.40213 for Series C First Preferred Shares, and $0.28125 for Series D First Preferred Shares.
news.headline: Emera Inc. declared quarterly dividends on its common shares and First Preferred Shares, ranging from $0.1364-$0.7250.

news.summary: A recent report titled "Global Market for Fuel Cells 2025" has been released via ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights the significant impact fuel cells are poised to have on the electricity generation sector worldwide. It predicts that by 2039, fuel cells will contribute to the production of 450 gigawatts of electricity, primarily utilizing hydrogen as fuel. Over the next 15 years, the revenue generated by fuel cells is estimated to exceed $536 billion. This technology represents a shift towards more sustainable and efficient power sources in the global energy landscape.
news.headline: Global fuel cells market booming with over 18,000 hydrogen fuel cell vehicles sold; $536 billion revenue expected by 2039.

news.summary: CardiAMP HF II is currently assessing the effectiveness of the CardiAMP™ Cell Therapy Product in treating individuals diagnosed with Ischemic Heart Failure. This study specifically targets patients with reduced ejection fraction and elevated markers of cardiac stress. The research aims to evaluate the potential benefits of this therapy in improving heart function and overall health outcomes for individuals with these conditions. The study involves a significant number of participants and is expected to provide valuable insights into the use of cell therapy for Ischemic Heart Failure treatment.
news.headline: BioCardia starts patient enrollment at Emory University for CardiAMP HF II study on heart failure treatment.

news.summary: Forte Minerals is set to undertake a 1,500-meter drill program at the Pucarini Gold Project located in Peru. The focus of the drilling will be on high-sulfidation epithermal gold, indicating significant discovery prospects at the site.
news.headline: Forte Minerals plans 1,500m drill program at Pucarini Gold Project in Peru, aiming to find high-sulfidation gold.

news.summary: A new artificial intelligence laboratory has been established to enhance freight operations for customers through the creation and implementation of cognitive AI solutions. This lab will focus on developing advanced technologies to streamline and optimize freight processes. The goal is to incorporate intelligent AI systems that can improve efficiency and provide better services to customers. This initiative aims to enhance freight operations by utilizing cutting-edge AI technologies.
news.headline: Freight Technologies creating AI Lab to improve cross-border logistics with innovative solutions for smarter operations.

news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company named Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DWTX) headquartered in Atlanta disclosed on April 11, 2025, that they have successfully attained compliance with the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). This rule mandates a minimum stockholders' equity of $2.5 million. Specializing in developing medications for pain and fatigue-related illnesses, the Company announced its achievement after receiving written confirmation from Nasdaq. This marks a significant milestone for Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. in their efforts to provide innovative solutions for such medical conditions.
news.headline: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DWTX) confirms regaining compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1), requiring $2.5M stockholders’ equity.

news.summary: BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK) stock has surged after the company posted its first-quarter 2025 results. Revenue increased by 12% year over year to reach $5.28 billion, falling short of the expected $5.60 billion. The company saw growth in investment advisory, administration fees, and securities lending revenues, which rose to $4.4 billion from $3.8 billion compared to the previous year. This was driven by higher organic base fees, market beta impact on average AUM, and approximately $285 million in fees from the GIP Transaction. Additionally, technology services and subscription revenue climbed to $436 million from $377 million, with strong demand for Aladdin technology offerings and the acquisition of Preqin Holding Limited in March 2025 contributing around $20 million to the revenues. BlackRock highlighted...
news.headline: BlackRock Q1 results: Revenue increases 12% to $5.28B, EPS beats estimates, $11.6T AUM, $84B inflows.

news.summary: StarkWare and Weizmann Institute of Science researchers have developed ColliderVM, a protocol enabling complex smart contracts on Bitcoin more efficiently. Bitcoin's limitations include 4 million OPCodes per block and 1,000 stack elements per script. The new system allows stateful computation, overcoming traditional challenges like stateless execution. Unlike previous implementations, ColliderVM eliminates the need for operators to front capital for fraud proofs. The system is more computationally efficient, leveraging hash collision-based commitments for verification. It requires fewer hash operations compared to BitVM, with claims of at least a 10,000 times reduction. ColliderVM makes STARKs-based Bitcoin sidechains nearly practical, offering trustless scalability. However, the system remains trust-minimized, requiring some level of participant honesty. Lead by Eli Ben-Sasson, the research emphasizes utilizing ZK-proofs to improve blockchain scalability while ensuring Bitcoin layer-2 solutions maintain the security of the Bitcoin network. Despite advancements, current layer-2 solutions like the Lightning Network still rely on trust in signers or fraud-proof-based incentives.
news.headline: StarkWare, Weizmann Institute propose smart contracts for Bitcoin using ColliderVM. New design enables complex contracts, and boasts increased efficiency in processing. Hash functions crucial in reducing processing time by up to 10000 times. Trust-minimized system, not entirely trustless. Lead authors of study include Eli Ben-Sasson. thinkers aim for Bitcoin layer-2 with BTC security level. Lightning Network alternative. Considered most secure chain, limited compared to alts. Sidechains present. ZK-proofs an exciting dev area in the crypto field. More work needed for trustless ZK-proof sidechains on BTC. Existing system relies on network honesty.

This innovative service aims to enhance customer engagement and streamline operations for food and beverage (F&B) establishments in Malaysia.
